title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Byju's - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Byju's - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Byju's in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's:
Byju's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
